hero.title: Your Bridge to
hero.tagline: Dream it. Plan it. Achieve it.
hero.description: Expert guidance for Bangladeshi students aspiring to study abroad. We make your international education journey seamless and successful.

services.title: What We
services.subtitle: Detailed SOPs, visa support, scholarship hunting—we handle the gritty details so you can focus on packing your bags.

lom.title: LOM / SOP Solution
lom.description: We craft your story, not just edit grammar. Our experts help you write compelling Letters of Motivation and SOPs that admissions officers actually read.

offer.title: Offer Letter
offer.description: Fast-tracked applications via our university network. We ensure your application is complete and error-free to maximize acceptance chances.

visa.title: Visa Support
visa.description: End-to-end guidance from appointment booking to mock interviews. We know the checklists inside out.

selection.title: University Selection
selection.description: Oxford or Toronto? We help you shortlist unis that fit your vibe, budget, and goals.

bank.title: Bank Solvency
bank.description: Struggling to show funds? We guide you on proper documentation, blocked accounts, and financial proof strategies that satisfy visa officers.

scholarship.title: Scholarship Hunting
scholarship.description: Studying abroad is expensive. We find hidden financial aid options and help you apply effectively.

about.title: Why Students Trust Us
about.description: We've helped hundreds of Bangladeshi students achieve their dreams of studying abroad. Our team combines personal experience with professional expertise.
features: Zero Fraud Risk: We NEVER hold your original passport or documents
No Advance Fees: You pay only after service delivery (consultation excluded)
BPMN 2.0 optimized workflows for faster, error-free applications

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From your first call to your flight — four simple steps to studying abroad.

call.title: Book a Call
call.description: Schedule a free 30-minute consultation. We listen, understand your goals, and assess your profile.

plan.title: Get Your Plan
plan.description: Receive a personalized roadmap with university shortlists, timelines, and a clear checklist.

apply.title: Apply & Prepare
apply.description: We handle SOPs, documents, visa applications, and mock interviews. You stay stress-free.

fly.title: Fly Abroad
fly.description: Pre-departure briefing, blocked accounts, housing tips — you're fully ready for your new life.

testimonials.title: From Students Who've Been There
testimonials.subtitle: These stories say it better than we ever could.
